data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'gap days/hours for cleaning/service', but the evidence does not provide any specific checks or confirmations regarding the existence of such gaps. While the linked use case mentions a 5-hour gap requirement, there is no evidence presented that explicitly confirms whether this requirement is enforced or if any gaps exist in the current bookings. The absence of concrete evidence to support the validation of this specific requirement leads to the conclusion that there is a gap in the coverage.
gaps: No evidence confirming the enforcement of gap days/hours for cleaning/service.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
